description_long: This object is a pixelated shotgun with a robust, metallic double-barrel design, featuring a side-by-side barrel configuration. The barrels are rendered in a gray metallic color, with a visible rib running along the top, and the muzzle is blunt and squared. The stock and grip are depicted in a dark brown, wood-like texture, with a pronounced, angular pistol grip for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, encasing the trigger area and connecting to the grip. The overall form is compact, with a short barrel and a truncated stock, suggesting a sawed-off style. The visual style is blocky and low-resolution, reminiscent of retro video game aesthetics.
description: A pixelated, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a metallic gray finish and a dark brown, angular pistol grip stock. The design is compact and blocky, with a prominent rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, the brown pistol grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two parallel barrel openings and the ribbed top between them.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the barrels, grip, and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the grip and the back of the receiver, with the barrels extending away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with a visible rib along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a solid, continuous form
